leadText: The Balm Mushroom (Japanese: かおるキノコ Fragrant Mushroom), formatted BalmMushroom prior to Generation VI, is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Balm Mushroom serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A rare mushroom which gives off a nice fragrance. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A rare mushroom that gives off a nice fragrance. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Quest Soft and precious ingredients.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B W B2 W2 N/A N/A * X Y OR AS N/A $ 6,250 S M US UM Sw Sh S V N/A $ 7,500 In the Generation V games, the BalmMushroom can be sold to the gourmet maniac on Route 5 for $ 25000. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , the Balm Mushroom can be sold to the valuable item buyer in Stow-on-Side for $ 25,000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Balm Mushroom serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A rare mushroom which gives off a nice fragrance. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A rare mushroom that gives off a nice fragrance. It can be sold at a high price to shops.
